Game.Name: Honke Sankyo Fever 2 - Jikki Simulation (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Part of the Sankyo Fever franchise. First title of the Honke Sankyo Fever Jikki Simulation series of games.
Game.Notes: Honke Sankyo Fever Jikki Simulation 2 ("Sankyo Fever Original Machine Simulation 2") is a 1995 pachinko game for the Super Famicom and the follow up to Honke Sankyo Fever Jikki Simulation, released earlier the same year. Like its predecessor, the game features a number of simulations of real-life pachinko machines that the player can practice on and study to prepare them for the real thing. These machines were produced by Sankyo, a manufacturer of pachinko machines in Japan, and the game is named for them.
